target: Timestamp Error tab and reading-guide wording: remove first-person 'we' voice, replace 'single-sentence'/'unilaterally' with scoped language
tldr_evidence: Two passages in build-scripts/generate-html.js were flagged for tone/voice problems by curmudgeon HOL-NARRATIVE c2 review. (1) The ds-reading-guide paragraph (line 1544) describes the Timestamp Error tab with first-person 'we' voice ('the most actionable methodology critique we can hand the dome author, and we want it visible at the nav level') which breaks the third-person tab-descriptor pattern ('Evaluation Guide sets out...', 'The Model covers...', 'Predictions Analysis audits...'). (2) The ds-tab-rationale paragraph (line 1888) calls the error 'a single-sentence methodology error the dome author can fix unilaterally' — the word 'single-sentence' understates a 4-component structural problem (predictions-only doc + pre-data timestamp + observation doc + post-data timestamp), and 'fix unilaterally' does not distinguish this tab from self-contradictions (which the dome author also controls).
tldr_verdict: Two targeted text replacements: (1) reading-guide Timestamp Error clause → third-person, removes 'we', keeps the rationale; (2) ds-tab-rationale → 'narrowly-scoped methodology error with a structurally simple fix' removes both overstatements. No verdict changes. No data changes. Both patches are additive precision improvements.

patches.description: Replace 'we' voice + parallel-structure violation in reading-guide Timestamp Error descriptor (ISS-2306, ISS-2310)
patches.find_text: surfaced as its own tab because this is the most actionable methodology critique we can hand the dome author, and we want it visible at the nav level
patches.replace_text: surfaced as its own tab because it is a narrowly-scoped methodology critique with a structurally simple fix — kept separate to make the recommendation easy to find

patches.description: Replace 'single-sentence methodology error' and 'fix unilaterally' in ds-tab-rationale (ISS-2308, ISS-2309)
patches.find_text: it is a single-sentence methodology error the dome author can fix unilaterally
patches.replace_text: it is a narrowly-scoped methodology error with a structurally simple fix

notes: Patches derived from ISS recommendations. Both passages are in build-scripts/generate-html.js (the template), not docs/index.html (the generated output). Decider must run build.js after applying.
